stories.title: Muchova Saves Match Point, Beats Gauff — All-Czech Wimbledon Final Set

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Gauff had the match. 9-8 up in the third-set tiebreak. Match point. Forehand drop shot — into the net. Muchova wins 12-10 in the tiebreak. 6-2, 1-6, 7-6(10). The Wimbledon women's final is all-Czech. #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Noskova 6-4, 6-4 in 79 minutes. Muchova 2h35m in a match-point thriller. One Czech player barely sweated. The other survived the most dramatic tiebreak of the fortnight. They both play each other on Saturday. #Wimbledon #WTA #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Muchova Saves Match Point, Outlasts Gauff in Tiebreak Thriller — All-Czech Wimbledon Final Set

stories.title: Women's Final Preview — Muchova vs. Noskova, First All-Czech Grand Slam Women's Final

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Wimbledon women's final Saturday: Muchova vs. Noskova. Both are Czech. Both are from Přerov — a city of 43,000 people. One of those people is Karolina Muchova. Another is Linda Noskova. This sport. #Wimbledon #WTA #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Saturday's Wimbledon final will crown a first-time Grand Slam champion. Czech women have won Wimbledon 12 times. Vondrousova 2023. Krejcikova 2024. Muchova or Noskova 2026. The pipeline is real. #Wimbledon #Czech #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Men's SF — Fery vs. Zverev: British Wild Card Faces Channel Slam Chaser

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: Centre Court right now: Fery vs. Zverev. A British wildcard ranked No. 114 vs. the Roland Garros champion chasing the Channel Slam. The last wildcard to reach this point at Wimbledon won the title. That was 2001. #Wimbledon #Fery #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: Five players have won the Channel Slam in the Open Era: Laver, Borg, Federer, Nadal, Djokovic. Zverev won Roland Garros. Today he faces Arthur Fery. The 23-year-old wildcard who has beaten everyone put in front of him. #Wimbledon #Zverev #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Men's SF — Sinner vs. Djokovic: Defending Champion vs. Record-Chasing 39-Year-Old

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: Sinner vs. Djokovic at Wimbledon — again. Sinner: defending champion, 12 straight sets won since R1. Djokovic: 39 years old, ankle and calf injury, came through a 5h15m QF. This is the match. #Wimbledon #Sinner #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: Djokovic is the oldest Wimbledon men's SF in the Open Era. He is playing on an injured ankle. He has seven Wimbledon titles and is fighting for an eighth. And Sinner is standing in the way. #Wimbledon #Djokovic #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Czech Women's Tennis Dynasty — From Navratilova to Noskova, the Legacy That Built Saturday's Final

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Czech women have won 12 Wimbledon singles titles. Navratilova 9. Novotna 1. Kvitova 2. Vondrousova 1. Krejcikova 1. Saturday they play each other for a 13th. From Martina to Muchova. The dynasty just keeps going. #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap
